Name: Snickers:
Text: What the heck are you?  You must be new here...

Name: Snickers:
Text: My  name is Snickers and I'm special.  you know why?

Name: Snickers:
Text: Because i can [tornado radius=5 freq=2] JUMP [/tornado]!

Text: I hope you can too, otherwise you'll be stuck here

Text: Just try using your legs and pressing the action button.
